result.markdown:
--- title: "Sketched and AR-aware models" subtitle: "Use low-rank GLM sketches and residual autocorrelation diagnostics." jupyter: python3 execute: freeze: auto --- ## Why Sketch? For large fMRI matrices, randomized sketches can reduce the temporal or spatial problem size before solving the GLM. ::: {#f4b0be8d .cell execution_count=1} ``` {.python .cell-code} import numpy as np import pandas as pd import fmrimod as fm from fmrimod.lowrank import LowRankConfig, fit_sketched rng = np.random.default_rng(14) n_time = 180 n_voxels = 30 time = np.linspace(-1, 1, n_time) X = np.column_stack([ np.ones(n_time), time, np.sin(np.linspace(0, 4 * np.pi, n_time)), ]) beta = rng.normal(size=(X.shape[1], n_voxels)) Y = X @ beta + rng.normal(scale=0.2, size=(n_time, n_voxels)) full = fm.fmri_ols_fit(Y, X) sketched = fit_sketched(X, Y, LowRankConfig(sketch_ratio=0.55, seed=1)) full["beta"].shape, sketched.betas.shape ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=1} ``` ((3, 30), (3, 30)) ``` ::: ::: ## Compare Estimates ::: {#1c2a862e .cell execution_count=2} ``` {.python .cell-code} comparison = pd.DataFrame({ "full_beta": full["beta"].ravel(), "sketched_beta": sketched.betas.ravel(), }) comparison.corr().iloc[0, 1].round(4) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=2} ``` 0.9997 ``` ::: ::: ## Residual Autocorrelation Temporal correlation should be inspected on residuals, especially before leaning on standard errors. ::: {#65d59899 .cell execution_count=3} ``` {.python .cell-code} residuals = Y - X @ full["beta"] acf = fm.acorr_diagnostics(residuals, max_lag=8) pd.DataFrame({"lag": acf["lags"], "acf": acf["acf"]}).round(3) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=3} ```{=html}
lag acf
0 1 0.138
1 2 -0.024
2 3 -0.131
3 4 -0.176
4 5 -0.041
5 6 0.152
6 7 0.020
7 8 -0.012
``` ::: ::: ## AR Noise Fixture ::: {#6860a519 .cell execution_count=4} ``` {.python .cell-code} ar_resid = fm.simulate_noise_vector( n_time, tr=2.0, ar=[0.5], ma=[], drift_amplitude=0.0, physio=False, seed=9, ) fm.acorr_diagnostics(ar_resid, max_lag=3)["acf"].round(3) ``` ::: {.cell-output .cell-output-display execution_count=4} ``` array([0.349, 0.212, 0.049]) ``` ::: ::: ## Next - [Linear model](linear-model.qmd) - [Simulation](simulation.qmd)
